name: sign_up_email
description: Create a new user account with email and password. Returns an ID token (JWT), a refresh token for session persistence, the new user's local ID, and the email. The ID token expires after 1 hour and must be refreshed using the exchange_refresh_token capability.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: The email address for the new user account.

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: The password for the new user account. Must be at least 6 characters.

parameters.name: returnSecureToken
parameters.description: Whether to return an ID and refresh token. Should always be true.
